  └ ok 0ms 8262 bytes

micro-mind is a Claude Code-style interactive development REPL powered by qwen25-1.5b-instruct via llama-server. It supports reading files and executing tool blocks inline. The README provides details on its features, including an anti-fail mode harness that leverages the lessons from luxe to improve performance with a single capable 1.5B model size.
